prompt: My qRT-PCR results have unusually high CT values (>35) for my reference gene GAPDH across all samples, while my target gene has normal CT values around 25. RNA quality looks fine (RIN > 8). This is a TaqMan assay. What might explain this discrepancy?

expected_root_causes: GAPDH assay degraded or wrong probe
Genomic DNA contamination inflating target signal
